name: openSprint
description: Open a new sprint with a goal and time window

goal.description: Primary outcome the sprint should achieve

startDate.description: Sprint start date in ISO 8601 format

endDate.description: Sprint end date in ISO 8601 format

name: addToSprint
description: Add an item from the backlog to an open sprint

itemId.description: Identifier of the backlog item to commit

estimate.description: Optional effort estimate (e.g., small, medium, large or a point value)

name: closeSprint
description: Close a sprint and record its outcome

sprintId.description: Identifier of the sprint to close

outcome.description: Whether the sprint goal was met
